name: io.github.hairglasses-studio.tmux-mcp
description: Tmux terminal multiplexer management with declarative workspace support

tools.name: tmux_list_sessions
tools.description: List all tmux sessions with window count, creation time, attached status

tools.name: tmux_new_session
tools.description: Create a new detached session with optional start directory and command

tools.name: tmux_kill_session
tools.description: Kill a tmux session by name

tools.name: tmux_list_windows
tools.description: List windows in a session with layout, pane count, active status

tools.name: tmux_new_window
tools.description: Create a new window in a session with optional name and command

tools.name: tmux_list_panes
tools.description: List panes in a session/window with dimensions, command, active status

tools.name: tmux_capture_pane
tools.description: Capture visible text content from a pane (default 50 lines)

tools.name: tmux_send_keys
tools.description: Send keystrokes to a pane (literal text or tmux key names like Enter, C-c)

tools.name: tmux_workspace
tools.description: Create multi-window, multi-pane workspace from declarative spec
